review_summary: dispatch in render is allowed (React optimizes) but creates loops if not guarded.

issues_found.title: Acceptable but careful
issues_found.explanation: React allows setState/dispatch in render if guarded.

issues_that_arent_issues: In-render dispatch with guard is valid.
what_makes_this_review_senior: Knowing in-render setState pattern is valid.

review_summary: No cleanup. Plus error handler missing.

issues_found.title: Connection leak
issues_found.explanation: Standard

issues_found.title: Errors lost
issues_found.explanation: Network errors silent

review_summary: In-flight request not aborted on cleanup. Race possible.

issues_found.title: In-flight on cleanup
issues_found.explanation: Cleanup stops new polls but in-flight completes after unmount.

code_under_review: <button onClick={async () => { await save(); navigate('/'); }}>Save</button>
review_summary: React doesn't await onClick. Errors silent.

issues_found.title: Unhandled rejection
issues_found.explanation: If save throws, unhandledrejection event.

fixed_code:
<button onClick={async () => {
  try {
    await save();
    navigate('/');
  } catch (e) {
    toast.error('Save failed');
  }
}}>Save</button>

// Or use mutation:
const mutation = useMutation({
  mutationFn: save,
  onSuccess: () => navigate('/'),
  onError: () => toast.error('Save failed')
});
<button onClick={() => mutation.mutate()}>Save</button>
what_makes_this_review_senior: Catch in async handlers; mutation pattern.

code_under_review: Skip to main
review_summary: sr-only means never visible. Keyboard users can't see it on focus.

issues_found.title: Always hidden
issues_found.explanation: Keyboard users tab to it but can't see. Should be visible on focus.

fixed_code: Skip to main

review_summary: Modal in URL is great for shareability + back-button. This is correct.

issues_found.title: Pattern is correct
issues_found.explanation: Modal state in URL = back button closes modal, sharable.
issues_found.root_cause: Verify Modal state in URL. by reproducing the failing case, applying the fix, and adding a regression assertion.
issues_found.fix: Verify Modal state in URL. by reproducing the failing case, applying the fix, and adding a regression assertion.
issues_found.verification: Verify Modal state in URL. by reproducing the failing case, applying the fix, and adding a regression assertion.

what_makes_this_review_senior: URL state for UI; nuqs for type-safe.

review_summary: File can't be JSON.stringified meaningfully. Other fields persist, file lost.

issues_found.title: File not serializable
issues_found.explanation: File loses content; only name persists.
issues_found.fix: Persist file as base64 or skip

what_makes_this_review_senior: Files in IDB, not localStorage JSON.

code_under_review: <div className={`box ${show ? 'visible' : 'hidden'} ${animated ? 'animate' : ''}`} />
review_summary: Toggling 'hidden' = display:none = no animation. Use opacity/visibility.

issues_found.title: display:none no animation
issues_found.explanation: display:none and !display:none = no transition.

fixed_code:
<div
  className={`box transition-opacity ${show ? 'opacity-100' : 'opacity-0 pointer-events-none'}`}
/>

// review-333: regression guard for Multi-class animations.
// Keep the corrected boundary covered by a focused unit test and a review note explaining why the original shortcut was unsafe.
what_makes_this_review_senior: display: none vs opacity for transitions.

review_summary: Pixi is ~400KB. For simple sprite = overkill. CSS or canvas2d sufficient.

issues_found.title: 400KB
issues_found.explanation: For bouncing ball, canvas2d or CSS animation suffice.

review_summary: Throw for absence = abuse of errors. Use suspense or conditional render.

issues_found.title: Errors for control flow
issues_found.explanation: throw for expected absence is anti-pattern. ErrorBoundary triggered for normal flow.

broader_pattern: Errors for exceptional, not normal absence.
what_makes_this_review_senior: Errors are exceptional, not normal absence.

review_summary: Inline handler from caller = re-sub on every parent render.

issues_found.title: Re-sub churn
issues_found.explanation: Standard

broader_pattern: Ref pattern for callback in hooks.

review_summary: Pattern of wrapping for cross-cutting. Could be HOC or hook.

issues_found.title: Pattern multiplication
issues_found.explanation: If many such wraps, consider hook or HOC.

code_under_review:
const next = params.get('next');
if (next) navigate(next);
review_summary: User-controlled redirect. Open redirect vulnerability.

issues_found.title: Open redirect
issues_found.explanation: next=https://evil.com → redirects user there post-login. Phishing.

review_summary: crypto.randomUUID server != client = hydration mismatch.

issues_found.title: SSR mismatch
issues_found.explanation: Server and client generate different UUIDs.

review_summary: Vite replaces env at BUILD time, not runtime. Single build can't target multiple envs.

issues_found.title: Vite env is build-time
issues_found.explanation: VITE_API_URL is replaced when 'vite build' runs. Can't set at deploy.

broader_pattern: Runtime config for multi-env single build.

review_summary: Chained effects = two renders for one logical change. Plus user reference changes trigger re-init.

issues_found.title: Two renders
issues_found.explanation: Fetch → setState (render 1) → effect → init.

issues_found.title: Object reference
issues_found.explanation: Standard

what_makes_this_review_senior: Primitive deps; React Query for fetch.

review_summary: callback in deps recreates timeout. Each callback change = new timer.

issues_found.title: Recreates timer
issues_found.explanation: Standard

review_summary: isMounted pattern works but AbortController is preferred (also cancels network).

issues_found.title: Doesn't cancel network
issues_found.explanation: isMounted prevents setState but request continues. Wastes bandwidth.

review_summary: = any default makes calls without explicit type lose checking.

issues_found.title: any default
issues_found.explanation: Caller without explicit type gets any.

review_summary: Empty alt + no link text = link has no accessible name.

issues_found.title: No accessible name
issues_found.explanation: SR announces 'link' with no destination/purpose.
issues_found.fix: alt with purpose OR aria-label on link

fixed_code: // Or: // review-345: regression guard for Empty link. // Keep the corrected boundary covered by a focused unit test and a review note explaining why the original shortcut was unsafe.
what_makes_this_review_senior: Link a11y: aria-label OR alt with purpose.

review_summary: shift mutates array. React sees same reference, skips render.

issues_found.title: Mutates state
issues_found.explanation: Mutated array = same ref = no re-render.

code_under_review: <input type="email" {...register('email', { setValueAs: v => v.trim() })} />
review_summary: setValueAs runs on register, may transform unexpectedly. Plus user can't type spaces.

issues_found.title: Trims during typing
issues_found.explanation: User types email, trim happens, may surprise.

review_summary: will-change always on = layer always promoted = memory.

issues_found.title: Memory
issues_found.explanation: Each will-change element = layer. 1000 elements = 1000 layers = memory.

review_summary: Recharts is ~120KB. For sparkline = overkill. visx, victory, or custom svg.

issues_found.title: Heavy for tiny
issues_found.explanation: Sparkline = 20 lines SVG.

what_makes_this_review_senior: Tool weight; inline SVG for trivial charts.

review_summary: Tests fail in CI without server running. Should mock.

issues_found.title: CI fail
issues_found.explanation: CI has no localhost:3000.
